requirementCueLines: 10 credits – Complete 2 courses from this list:
BBUS 476 – New Technology & Future Markets (300, BBUS/ELCBUS 320, 350)
BBUS 490 – Special Topics in Business (300, 310) , BBUS 490 may or may not count depending on course topic; see your adviser before registering.
Before you can register for a capstone courses, you must complete all core courses and meet with your advisor to file a graduation application .
